productDisplayName: Timberland Men Toddler Black Casual Shoes
description: Gift your child that absolute comfort with the timberland Hypertrail WP H& L Oxford. The suede and nubuck upper, and padded fabric inner lining will find your little one playing in absolute comfort.UpperSuede and nubuck upper with velcro closure straps on the forefoot for a snug, customised FitGore-Tex mesh and padding of the tongue and collar for enhanced breathable comfort and waterproofingPadded fabric inner lining for all-day, sweat-free comfortPaded foam footbed with a fabric inner lining for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs throughout for absolute grip and tractionCurved midfoot for inner arch supportshoe careWipe dust with a dry, clean clothUse a suede and nubuck brushDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
